bias_notes: A premium country track with a lengthy 1900m circumference and tight turns. Its standout feature is a massive 475m home straight that runs slightly uphill to the finishing post.

handicapping_angles.track_bias: The long, uphill straight is a genuine stamina test. It heavily suits horses that can finish strongly, allowing backmarkers plenty of time to wind up and swoop late.
handicapping_angles.barrier_draw: Generally fair due to the long runs from most starting points. Horses can be well back on the turn and still win.
